raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a pair of speakers from Best Buy. I returned the item within the allowed return time frame. The speakers were physically inspected by the customer service representative at the time of the return and deemed it to be in good condition. The refund was issued. Attached is the return receipt showing the refund. XXXX week later the refund was reversed. The merchant stated that the product was returned in poor condition which is contradictory. Citibank sided with the merchant and I disagree. At this point I don't have the refund nor the product.
